questions.context_sentence: He spent about twenty-one hours in space.
questions.hint: 字母s加单词pent(被关起来的)，度过了一段时间。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: He ____ about twenty-one hours in space.
questions.cn: 他在太空中度过了大约21小时。

questions.context_sentence: He spent about twenty-one hours in space.
questions.hint: a+bout(回合)，大约就是这个回合。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 他在太空中度过了大约21小时。

questions.context_sentence: In October 2003, my father flew into space in Shenzhou V.
questions.hint: 飞行的过去式，把y变成了ew。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 2003年10月，我父亲乘坐神舟五号飞入太空。

questions.context_sentence: In October 2003, my father flew into space in Shenzhou V.
questions.hint: Octo(八)原本是八月，后来变成了十月。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: In ____ 2003, my father flew into space in Shenzhou V. (提示: 月份)
questions.cn: 2003年10月，我父亲乘坐神舟五号飞入太空。

questions.context_sentence: He also made a video in space.
questions.hint: vi(看)+deo，就是可以看的录像。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 他还在太空中制作了一段录像。

questions.meaning: 感到自豪的,感到骄傲的
questions.context_sentence: I was very proud of him.
questions.hint: p+round(圆)，骄傲得挺起了圆圆的胸膛。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 感到自豪的,感到骄傲的
questions.cn: 我为他感到非常自豪。

questions.context_sentence: I want to go into space someday too.
questions.hint: some(一些)+day(日子)，总会有那么一天。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I want to go into space ____ too. (提示: 时间)
questions.cn: 我也想有朝一日进入太空。

questions.context_sentence: Helen Keller was born in the US in 1880.
questions.hint: b+orn(装饰)，出生时世界为我装饰。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 海伦·凯勒于1880年在美国出生。

questions.context_sentence: As a baby, she became blind and deaf.
questions.hint: 字母a和s，作为一个词。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 还是婴儿的时候，她就失明失聪了。

questions.context_sentence: As a baby, she became blind and deaf.
questions.hint: be+came(来)，变成了这样。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: As a baby, she ____ blind and deaf. (提示: 变成)
questions.cn: 还是婴儿的时候，她就失明失聪了。

questions.context_sentence: She drew letters in Helen's hand and taught her to spell.
questions.hint: let(让)+ter，让字母排好队。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 她在海伦手上画字母，并教她拼写。

questions.context_sentence: She drew letters in Helen's hand and taught her to spell.
questions.hint: s+pell(皮)，拼写单词要脱掉外皮看核心。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 她在海伦手上画字母，并教她拼写。

questions.context_sentence: She wrote a book about herself and travelled all over the world.
questions.hint: her(她)+self(自己)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: She wrote a book about ____ and travelled all over the world. (提示: 反身代词)
questions.cn: 她写了一本关于自己的书，并环游了世界。

questions.context_sentence: She wrote a book about herself and travelled all over the world.
questions.hint: all(全部)+over(结束/上方)，遍及所有地方。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 她写了一本关于自己的书，并环游了世界。

questions.context_sentence: Helen lived to be eighty-seven.
questions.hint: i在这个词里发短音/ɪ/，活着就是一种力量。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 海伦活到了八十七岁。

questions.context_sentence: She is a role model for blind people, and also for you and me.
questions.hint: role(角色)+model(模型)，角色的模范。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: She is a ____ for blind people. (提示: 榜样)
questions.cn: 她是盲人的榜样，也是你和我的榜样。

questions.context_sentence: My father, Yang Liwei, is a taikonaut, and he is very famous.
questions.hint: tai(太空)+ko(人)+naut(船员)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我父亲杨利伟是一名宇航员，他非常有名。

questions.context_sentence: My mother and I went to the airport to meet my father.
questions.hint: air(空气)+port(港口)，飞机的港口。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我妈妈和我去了机场接我父亲。

questions.context_sentence: As a baby, she became blind and deaf.
